cleavage agent: enzymatically digested with a mixture of trypsin and GluC
collision energy: using stepped HCD (high energy collisional dissociation, normalized collision energies (NCE): 27, 30, 33 %)
fragmentation method: using stepped HCD (high energy collisional dissociation, normalized collision energies (NCE): 27, 30, 33 %)
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer equipped EASY-Spray™ ion source
ionization type: coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer equipped EASY-Spray™ ion source
